Jurassic Park Part 2: The Chaos Continues

Single-file SNES build. Two-player controls are preloaded, the ROM is embedded directly in this HTML file, and stuck movement is cleared during quiz popups.

Player 1

Move: ↑ ↓ ← →
Actions: P O I U
Shoulders: L K
Select / Start: Shift / J

Player 2

Move: W A S D
Actions: C V B N
Shoulders: Q E
Select / Start: F / G
45-second head start from your first control input. After that, a question appears every 12 seconds. Correct answers are worth 50 points plus a 10-point streak bonus for each consecutive correct answer after the first.
